Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference

Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ConstructorReference
    Constructor reference.
    IExecutionContext
    extracted interface to allow schema variabes to stand for an execution context
    MemberReference
    Member reference.
    MethodName
    Method name.
    MethodOrConstructorReference  
    NameReference
    A NameReference references an entity by its explicite name.
    PackageReferenceContainer
    Element that contains a PackageReference.
    ReferencePrefix
    Reference prefix.
    ReferenceSuffix
    Reference suffix.
    TypeReference
    TypeReferences reference Types by name.
    TypeReferenceContainer
    Type reference container.
    TypeReferenceInfix
    ReferencePrefix and -suffix that is admissible for outer type references.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    ArrayLengthReference
    Array length reference.
    ArrayReference
    Array reference.
    ExecutionContext  
    FieldReference  
    MetaClassReference
    Meta class reference.
    MethodReference
    Method reference.
    PackageReference
    Package reference.
    SchematicFieldReference
    Field reference.
    SchemaTypeReference  
    SpecialConstructorReference
    Occurs in a constructor declaration as the first statement as this(...) or super(...) reference.
    SuperConstructorReference
    Super constructor reference.
    SuperReference
    Super reference.
    ThisConstructorReference
    This constructor reference.
    ThisReference
    A reference to the current object.
    TypeRef  
    TypeReferenceImp
    TypeReferences reference Types by name.
    VariableReference  

Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference Description

Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
